title: adenosma glutinosa
intro: Adenosma glutinosa, also known as Adenosma, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Adenosma glutinosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or ointments, and is often consumed as a supplement in capsule or tincture form.
